title: April 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 29''' is the 119th day of the year (120th in leap years). There are 246 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Irvin Kershner]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Steve Blum]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Fares Fares]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Mark Stanley]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[1998]] – [[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[John Berkey]] dies.
*2008 – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' paperback published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures: Han Solo and the Hollow Moon of Khorya]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 6: Vindication|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Vindication'' trade paperback]] published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 35|''Legacy'' (2006) 35]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol (article)|''The Secret Journal of Doctor Demagol'']] published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Valsedian Operation]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[2015]] – [[Princess Leia 3|''Princess Leia'' 3]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Jok Church]] dies.
*[[2025]] – "[[Ever Been to Ghorman?]]", "[[I Have Friends Everywhere]]", and "[[What a Festive Evening]]" aired on Disney+.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Reign Omnibus]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — Crash Zone]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Women of the Galaxy: Updated and Expanded]]'' published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars Insider 231|''Star Wars Insider'' 231]] published.
*2025 – ''[[This is Rey]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents 3|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents'' 3]] to be published.
<noinclude>
